name: Steak Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each steak in half to make 4 pieces.
2. Place steaks between 2 sheets of wax paper; pound with flat of knife or wooden mallet until all sides are 1/2 inch thick.
3. Melt 1/4 cup butter or margarine on a large griddle (or use two skillets); stir in mustard and salt.
4. Drizzle 1 tablespoon olive oil over steaks. Sprinkle with half the pepper; rub pepper and oil into steaks using a spoon.
5. Cook steaks with the oil-pepper side down for 2 minutes; spoon pan juices over steaks occasionally.
6. Rub remaining oil and pepper on the unseasoned side of steaks; turn over; cook for 2 more minutes until pink inside.
7. Remove steaks from the pan; keep warm.
8. Remove pan from heat; add 3 tablespoons butter or margarine and Worcestershire sauce.
9. Add 1/4 cup Colonial Club Blackberry liqueur into the skillet; blend all juices; add parsley; pour over steaks.
10. Serve immediately.
